goal: Review the current community-module implementation against docs/community/COMMUNITY_MODULE_SPEC.md and identify concrete gaps, bugs, integration risks, or false-positive completion claims so the user can redirect another AI to continue implementation.
constraints: Do not modify runtime code in this task; this is a review-only task.
Focus on src/community, src/components/community, src/hooks/useCommunityState.ts, and related MainMenu integration only.
Prefer concrete findings with file references over general commentary.
Do not assume the other AI's summary is correct; verify against the actual files.
deliverables: A review summary with prioritized findings, file references, and residual risks.
